title: Cubic mean
body:
The cubic mean (written as 
  
    
      
        
          
            
              
                x
                ¯
              
            
          
          
            
              c
              u
              b
              i
              c
            
          
        
      
    
    {\displaystyle {\bar {x}}_{\mathrm {cubic} }}
  
) is a specific instance of the generalized mean with 
  
    
      
        p
        =
        3
      
    
    {\displaystyle p=3}
  
.
